examples:
The {{hl|"clan"}} selection can be used to apply a texture to the areas that usually display the [[squad.xml]] logo:
<sqf>MyVehicle setObjectTexture ["clan", "\a3\missions_f_epa\data\img\orbat\b_111_texture_ca.paa"];</sqf>
name: setObjectTexture

Item.desc: index of the selection. It is defined in the [[CfgVehicles Config Reference#hiddenSelections|hiddenSelections]] array in the vehicle's config (starting with 0). If a string is given, it referes to a hiddenSelection name or clan selection instead of an index.
Item.name: selection

Item.desc: path to texture. Since {{GVI|arma3|2.20}} using "#reset" would reset to default texture.
Item.name: texture
